title: Memory Upgrade
description:
Purchase memory upgrade to unlock higher memory limits & allow higher memory usage without interruptions.

1. Get + 1 GB ram permanently for your server (No monthly payments)
2. Handle more load players, scripts & custom software without lagging
3. Can be purchased more than one time, up to 6 GB of extra ram
4. 1-3 hours delivery upon payment received

title: Core Upgrade
description:
Purchase CPU cores upgrade to unlock higher CPU usage limits & allow better performance without interruptions.

1. Get + 1 CPU core permanently for your server (No monthly payments)
2. Handle more load players, scripts & custom software without lagging
3. Each purchased core has 60% of usable CPU usage, if you already have max of 60% CPU, after buying extra core you will have a max of 120%
4. Can be purchased maximum up to 1 core
5. 1-3 hours delivery upon payment received
